subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant whom Thou didst bring forth from the loins of one of Thy loved ones and didst name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی اظهرته من صلب احد من احبائک و سمیته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @naming of children; of individuals, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God
